differential_diagnoses: Nephrotic syndrome (secondary to membranous nephropathy or IgA nephropathy)
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
next_steps: Quantification of proteinuria with 24-hour urine collection or spot protein-to-creatinine ratio
Renal biopsy with Congo red staining and immunofluorescence
Echocardiogram with strain imaging to evaluate for amyloid infiltration
Bone marrow biopsy for clonal plasma cell assessment
Cardiac MRI if echocardiography is inconclusive for restrictive cardiomyopathy or amyloidosis

differential_diagnoses: AL amyloidosis with cardiac and renal involvement
Monoclonal Gammopathy of Renal Significance (MGRS) with IgA nephropathy or proliferative glomerulonephritis
Congestive hepatopathy secondary to heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
next_steps: Quantification of proteinuria with 24-hour urine collection
Serum albumin and comprehensive metabolic panel to assess for hypoalbuminemia
Echocardiogram with global longitudinal strain analysis for amyloid pattern
Kidney biopsy with Congo red staining, electron microscopy, and immunofluorescence for IgA and light chain restriction
Bone marrow biopsy and aspirate with Congo red staining and flow cytometry
Cardiac MRI with late gadolinium enhancement to evaluate for infiltrative cardiomyopathy
